data.revised_prompt: Clean HD hand-painted 2D game character concept for a cultivation roguelite, simplified and game-readable, based on a premium xianxia aesthetic. Full body female xianxia cultivator, elegant young woman with wood-and-sword spirit-root feeling, long dark ink hair, one jade-and-gold hair ornament, small forehead gem, white and pale-jade robes with light gold trim, a few translucent teal ribbons, holding one slim jade sword close to the body. Three-quarter RPG view, neutral hero pose, centered composition, generous padding, clear feet anchor, character occupies about 65% of the canvas. Reduce accessory density, pattern density, and fabric layering; keep silhouette strong and readable; refined hand-painted fantasy RPG asset, crisp edges, simplified fine details, polished but not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Soft celestial glow, calm and refined, subtle readable edge lighting. Materials: silk robe surfaces with limited decoration, polished jade accent, simple metal sword fittings. Single character only. Perfectly flat solid chroma-key background #FF00FF only, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation, no scene elements, no UI, no text, no watermark. Avoid extreme costume detail, excessive ribbons, heavy embroidery, hyperreal skin texture, extra weapons, cropped feet, giant aura, cluttered silhouette. Character should avoid magenta in clothing and skin tones.
